description: Bonifacio Caput, a continuous-shift factory worker, presents with excessive daytime sleepiness and chronic night-shift insomnia following a workplace 'near-miss' safety incident. As the occupational health team, use GNU Health to manage his Shift Work Sleep Disorder (SWSD). This includes diagnosing the condition, documenting the clinical evaluation of his fatigue and the incident, ordering CBC and Thyroid/TSH labs, and prescribing a wakefulness-promoting agent or chronobiotic (Modafinil, Armodafinil, or Melatonin). Ensure that sleep hygiene counseling is recorded in his lifestyle record and a follow-up is scheduled for 14 to 30 days from now. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
